title: Account recovery process
content: For account access issues, validate the customer's identity, confirm the email associated with the account, and guide them through password reset or MFA recovery. Never ask for full passwords.

title: Duplicate charge policy
content: For duplicate charges, confirm invoice ID, transaction date, amount, and payment method. If duplicate billing is confirmed, create a refund review request.

title: Refund review
content: Refund requests require order ID, payment confirmation, reason for refund, and eligibility review according to the refund policy.

title: Delayed tracking
content: For delayed tracking updates, verify order ID, carrier, last known status, and shipping address. Escalate if tracking has not updated for more than 72 hours.

title: Subscription cancellation
content: Cancellation requests should confirm the account email, subscription plan, renewal date, and whether the customer wants immediate cancellation or end-of-cycle cancellation.

title: Technical troubleshooting
content: For technical issues, collect device, operating system, app version, error message, steps to reproduce, and screenshots if available.

title: Product plan questions
content: For general plan inquiries, explain available plans, recommend a plan based on company size and needs, and offer to connect with sales if required.
